summary.title: Operational Station
summary.human_meaning: Available for the scoped station workflow.
summary.next_recommended_action: Proceed through the next validated station command.

current.owner_instruction_ru: Send to Servitor: TASK_ID: TASK-NEWREALITY-IMPERIAL-IDE-OPERATIONAL-STATION-UX-HARDENING-AGENT-ROSTER-DIRTY-CLASSIFIER-PC-V0_1 and start task

agents.role: Owner intent and external execution authority
Task routing and canonical local registration
Agent dispatch contracts and handoff receipts
Operator-facing shell, TUI, GUI, and station workflow

real_servitor_execution.reason: No owner-approved real execution gate is open.
real_servitor_execution.future_gate: Dedicated real servitor execution task with receipts.

live_llm_backend.reason: No live LLM secrets/backend gate is open.
live_llm_backend.future_gate: Dedicated LLM backend task with secret policy.

unsafe_shell.reason: Mechanicus policy keeps unknown and unsafe commands blocked.

arbitrary_shell.reason: Must remain false for this task.

dirty_state.recommended_action: Stage only validated in-scope task outputs; keep known unrelated ZIPs unstaged; do not delete files.

data.validated_push_policy: validated push is allowed and expected after validation, scope check, secret check, and task policy
data.reason: OPS task console, builder, dry-run registration, launch card, lifecycle, safety, and git closure are wired; live execution remains gated.
WARP engine and TUI smoke passed; release remains manifest-only and kernel promotion remains blocked.
Script-first smoke is available; live backend and production execution require future gates.
